/home/lenovo/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sMODULARIZE=1 "-sEXPORT_NAME='AOProModule'" -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=64MB -sMAXIMUM_MEMORY=512MB "-sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free']" "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['ccall','cwrap','getValue','setValue','HEAPU16','HEAPF64']" -sENVIRONMENT=web -O3 --bind CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/preprocessing.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/centroiding.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/wavefront_recon.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/turbulence.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/dm_control.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/hysteresis.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/control.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/spgd_backup.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/src/pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/ao_pro_wasm.dir/wasm/bindings.cpp.o -o "/mnt/c/Users/lenovo/Downloads/Nh3 backend/app/public/ao_pro_wasm.js"  -lm
